{{Quote|I thought you told me Eos was uninhabitable.|Vana Sage to [[Mod-3]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" />}}
'''Eos''' was a dark [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]]-rich [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that hosted a large [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Factory/Legends|foundry]] belonging to the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Characteristics==
Eos was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EA Online" /> volcano<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Strongholds">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> Found in the [[Eos system/Legends|Eos system]] in the [[Cadavine sector/Legends|Cadavine sector]],<ref name="EA Online" /> it [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] one [[Star/Legends|sun]].

==History==
===Pre-Clone Wars===
{{Quote|Eos has a tough defense system, thus getting into the atmosphere's going to be a challenge.|Nym|<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" />}}
The [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] established a [[Droid factory (Eos)|foundry]] on Eos, which was protected by a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] powered by eight generator pylons, and a large planetary cannon that could shred [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. Eos produced many of the weapons that saw action with the Trade Federation invasion army that conquered [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" /> in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] itself refers to its events taking place during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes that the invasion happens in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref>

Shortly prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], the foundry was [[Skirmish at Eos|discovered]] accidentally by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Vana Sage]], as she tracked a damaged [[Hunter-Seeker droid]] to the molten surface. There she found herself trapped by the shield, which she was forced to destroy in order to escape; during which she expressed her surprise at the planet's ability to "remain geometrically stable enough to form a gravimetric mass". Later, she, [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], [[Reti]], and [[Rhys Dallows]] returned to aid Naboo by [[Battle of Eos (Invasion of Naboo)|destroying]] the factory. Reti and Rhys remained in orbit to destroy the cannon's targeting satellites, using their speed to their advantage, while Vana and Nym headed to the surface to take down the facility.<ref name="Star Wars: Starfighter" /> With the destruction of the Eos facility, the Trade Federation moved much of its droid production to factories on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="Darth Plagueis novel">[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']]</ref><ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]''</ref> and [[Hypori/Legends|Hypori]].<ref name="CW series">''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''</ref>

===Galactic Civil War===
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] also fought a [[Battle of Eos|battle]] on the world, commanded by [[Brenn Tantor]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>
